session.user:

``` make fast-ci ```
Report all output including any errors, failures, or success messages. Include the full output for any failing checks.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report all output.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci from repository root

session.assistant:
## Summary
make fast-ci passed successfully. All checks completed without errors:
**Results:** - **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1728 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: (no output, passed) - **Exec Reference Check**: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date - **ty**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5986 passed in 14.82s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 138 passed in 6.13s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 123 passed in 0.81s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 50 passed - **AGENTS.md standard**: PASSED - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing**: 19 files checked, 0 violations
All checks passed successfully with no failures or errors.
